name: Dilled Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 boneless pork shoulder roast (3-4 pounds), trimmed and cubed
6 tablespoons minced fresh dill or 2 tablespoons dill weed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut about five deep slits across the top of the roast.
2. Combine the seasonings; stuff some into the slits.
3. Tie the meat securely.
4. Rub the roast with the remaining seasonings.
5. Place the roast in a large resealable plastic bag and refrigerate overnight.
6. Remove the roast from the bag and place it in a greased roasting pan.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 325 degrees for 2 1/2 to 3 hours or until a meat thermometer reads 170 degrees and the meat is tender.
8. Let stand 10 minutes before slicing.
Yield: 10-12 servings
